backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a blur effect on the Hero component background image to improve text contrast and readability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, styling, and page structure for the Pureblend Spice website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes, plus base styles for borders and body.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with basic meta tags, page title 'Pureblend Spice', root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the Home page component as the main application view.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying company branding, tagline, copyright notice, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking and heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with 4px blurred background image, bright yellow text with multiple text shadows for company name, tagline, and three description paragraphs, plus animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/MarketOpportunit: Market opportunity section showcasing clean-label demand and global growth trends, three target customer segments with icons, and premium wellness positioning statement.
frontend/src/components/ProblemStatement: Problem statement section displaying four key industry issues in card format with icons and a summary statement about Pureblend's solution approach.
frontend/src/components/RevenueModel.tsx: Displays a multi-channel revenue strategy section with four sales channels (Direct-to-Consumer, Retail Partnerships, Subscription Model, Premium Offerings), each showing icons, descriptions, and feature lists.
frontend/src/components/SectionDivider.t: Renders a decorative divider component with a spice pattern background image, gradient overlays, and centered decorative dots for visual separation between sections.
frontend/src/components/SocialImpact.tsx: Presents the social impact section highlighting partnerships with women-led farmer organizations, fair trade practices, sustainable agriculture, and community empowerment with accompanying imagery and detailed descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Solution.tsx: Showcases the product solution with features like preservative-free, no artificial colors, handcrafted quality, and clean label, plus nutritional enhancements from moringa and curry leaves with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/VisionCallToActi: Displays vision and mission statements in a grid layout with a call-to-action section seeking partners and investors, including investment opportunity and partnership details with contact information.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, using React Query for caching and automatically invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options for idle behavior and derivation origins.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Crimson Text and Inter), configures Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm terracotta/earthy color theme with light and dark mode variants using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that composes the landing page by rendering Hero, ProblemStatement, Solution, SocialImpact, MarketOpportunity, VisionCallToAction, RevenueModel, and Footer components with SectionDividers between them.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom OKLCH color variables, typography plugins, container queries, animations, custom fonts (Crimson Text and Inter), and keyframe animations for accordions and fade-in effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting Pureblend Spice Private Limited website features, including homepage, problem statement, solution, social impact, market opportunity, vision/CTA, and revenue model sections focused on handcrafted spice blends and women-led FPO sourcing.
